name: the-advocates-killer
title: The Advocate's Killer: Legal Suspense Murder Mystery
author: Teresa Burrell
description: Attorney Sabre O. Brown receives a text with an image of a dead social worker she recently opposed in juvenile court. As the threats escalate — from frightening texts to packages with dire warnings — Sabre and her private investigator JP race to connect the dots through past court cases before she becomes the next victim of the Advocate's Killer.
